theme_and_archetype.reasoning: ClosetAI requires high-fashion aesthetics paired with utility. The Swiss & High-Contrast archetype provides a minimalist, editorial backdrop (like a Vogue magazine) that lets the user's clothing take center stage. 95% monochrome with stark black and white, using Signal Red strictly for alerts, price drops, or destructive actions.

layout_and_spacing.global: Mobile-first approach. Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) around main containers. No center-alignment for text unless in an empty state.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Bottom tab navigation with 5 tabs (Wardrobe, Outfits, Wishlist, Calendar, Profile). The tab bar should have a solid #FFFFFF background with a 1px top border (#E5E5E5). Active icon in #0A0A0A, inactive in #A3A3A3.
layout_and_spacing.wardrobe_grid: Bento-style grid. 2 columns (grid-cols-2) with tight gap-4. Items should have sharp corners or max rounded-md. Image should fill the container.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat, 1px solid border (#E5E5E5), NO box-shadows. Background #FFFFFF. Sharp corners (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-sm) to maintain the Swiss Brutalist feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#FFFFFF] rounded-none px-6 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none px-6 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide active:scale-95 transition-transform

inputs.text_field: border-b border-[#0A0A0A] bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-b-2 placeholder:text-[#737373]

ai_chat.user_bubble: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#FFFFFF] p-4 rounded-tl-2xl rounded-tr-2xl rounded-bl-2xl rounded-br-none self-end max-w-[80%]
ai_chat.ai_bubble: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#0A0A0A] p-4 rounded-tl-2xl rounded-tr-2xl rounded-bl-none rounded-br-2xl self-start max-w-[80%]
ai_chat.quick_replies: flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto py-2. Pills: border border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm whitespace-nowrap

wishlist_item.container: flex row gap-4 p-4 border-b border-[#E5E5E5] items-center

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"').

onboarding.description: Chic minimal fashion model (use for Welcome / Onboarding Screen 1)
Fashion editorial model (use for Onboarding Screen 2)

wardrobe_placeholders.description: White knit sweater on flat surface (use for Tops category placeholder)
Jeans on white background (use for Bottoms category placeholder)

empty_states.description: Blank smartphone layout (use as a background or visual for empty calendar/wishlist states)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT introduce new blues or purples. Use #FF3B30 only for alerts or sales.
Use Outfit for all headings, keep tracking tight. Use IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Avoid standard card shadows. Use 1px borders instead for a high-fashion, technical look.
Implement a 5-tab bottom navigation bar for mobile-first layout. Avoid hamburger menus for primary navigation.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
For the AI Chat, implement a full-screen mobile view, not a floating widget. Use clear chat bubbles with high contrast.
Please read /app/design_guidelines.json thoroughly before creating UI components.
